declaredCOO.description: Country of Origin as declared on the commercial invoice

htsCodes.description: Comma-separated 10-digit HTS codes for all line items

shipperCountry.description: Country where the exporter is registered

goodsDescription.description: Detailed goods description from the commercial invoice

totalValue_USD.description: Total declared shipment value in US dollars

salesforceOrderId.description: Salesforce Order record ID for cross-reference

COO_MisclassificationRisk.description: True if Country of Origin appears to be misrepresented or transshipped

PO_HasAllDetails.description: True if all 22 CBP-required shipment fields are present and non-empty

riskLevel.description: Overall risk classification: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or NONE

riskFactors.description: List of specific transshipment or misclassification indicators detected

declaredCOO.description: Country of Origin as provided in the input

suspectedTrueCOO.description: Agent-assessed true country of origin if different from declared

htsMisclassificationRisk.description: True if HTS codes appear inconsistent with the goods description or declared origin

recommendation.description: Recommended action: BLOCK, ESCALATE, or APPROVE

searchSummary.description: Synthesized evidence from the three web searches performed
